name: Blade of Oaths
description: This gleaming longsword is +2 holy bane (undead). It deals an extra 2d6 points of damage against evil creatures and an extra 2d6 against undead creatures, stacking with holy. The blade glows with pale golden light when undead are within 60 ft.

name: Axe of the Dwarvish Lords
description: This +3 returning throwing speed battleaxe was crafted by the legendary dwarven smith Morgrin. When thrown, it returns to the thrower's hand after each attack. The speed property allows one additional attack per round at the full attack bonus.

name: Mace of Disruption
description: This +2 disruption heavy mace destroys undead on a hit. Any undead creature struck must make a DC 14 Will save or be utterly destroyed. The mace also sheds light as a torch and deals an extra 2d6 damage to undead on any hit.

name: Greatsword of the Berserker
special_properties: Furious (+2 additional enhancement bonus while raging)
description: This +2 furious greatsword blazes with chaotic power when its wielder enters a rage. While raging, the enhancement bonus increases to +4. The sword occasionally urges its wielder to enter a rage even when they might not wish to (DC 14 Will to resist at start of combat).

name: Dagger of Venom
special_properties: Poison (3/day: 1d10 Con initial, 1d10 Con secondary, DC 14 Fort)
description: This +1 dagger has a serrated black blade. Three times per day on command, the wielder can apply a virulent contact poison to the blade as a free action. The next successful hit delivers the poison: DC 14 Fortitude save, 1d10 Constitution initial damage and 1d10 Constitution secondary damage.

name: Scimitar of Speed
special_properties: Speed (one extra attack per round at highest attack bonus)
description: This +2 speed scimitar allows the wielder to make one extra attack per round at their highest attack bonus. The enchantment makes the blade seem to blur when swung in a full attack. It is particularly prized by fighters who rely on Weapon Finesse or who multiclass as rangers.
